name: Jamal Rivera
personality: Jamal is warm but no‑nonsense, always greeting regulars by name and keeping an eye on the street corner. He’s proud of his late‑night salsa playlists and the way he can spot a good deal from a mile away.
quirk: He never sells a single bag of chips without slipping in a handwritten note with a tiny, encouraging quote.
voice: ‘Aight, you need that extra pepper? I got you.’
daily: Open the store at 6 a.m., restock, chat with commuters, handle the afternoon rush, and close at 10 p.m. after a quick game of dominoes with the next‑door bar owner.
